issues.detail: The skill file provides descriptive guidance but lacks step-by-step runnable procedures.
Only one realistic example is provided, falling short of the required two examples.

scenarios.name: Invoice processing scenario with conditional routing
scenarios.rationale: Treatment lays out a Gmail trigger to Filter to Drive to OpenAI to Router branching on amount with downstream Slack/QuickBooks modules, matching the scenario structure pattern; baseline suggests generic workflow steps without Make's trigger/router/filter vocabulary.

scenarios.name: Custom API call with array iteration and retryable error route
scenarios.rationale: Treatment uses the HTTP module with {{1.field}} mapping syntax, an Iterator for array items, and a Break error route for retryable failures; baseline writes code that doesn't reflect Make's iterator/aggregator and Break/Resume/Rollback error-handler model.
